subject: New Opening: Java Developer – Java
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Kredify
ROLE: Lead Java Developer
START: 2022-04-14
DURATION: 18 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / hybrid
RATE: 1050 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Java, AWS and PostgreSQL.

Key requirements:
• Java
• AWS
• PostgreSQL

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Maria Svensson
Senior Talent Manager
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 70 567 89 01
